description_long: This is a standard Western-style toilet with a rectangular, exposed cistern mounted above a rounded bowl. The toilet is primarily white with some visible discoloration and staining inside the bowl, suggesting use or age. The cistern features a visible flush lever on the right side, and the base is broad and flat, designed for stable floor mounting. The bowl is open and does not have a visible seat, exposing the rim and interior. The overall design is utilitarian, with smooth surfaces and minimal decorative elements. The toilet appears to be made mostly of ceramic, with some metal components for the flush mechanism.
description: A white, floor-mounted toilet with an exposed cistern and visible flush lever, showing some interior staining and no seat.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open bowl, rim, and the full face of the cistern.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bowl's profile and the depth of the cistern.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cistern and the base, with no visible flush mechanism.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the flush lever on the cistern and the open bowl.
